title: Speaker & Workshop Conductor
description: Delivered sessions on presentation skills, entrepreneurship, and tech career guidance; mentored 200+ students.

title: Hackathon Finalist – Woodpecker Hackathon
description: Built a machine maintenance ML solution projected to reduce machine downtime by predicting threshold duration for maintenance, demonstrating ability to align machine learning with real business problems.

title: Event Lead & Main Host – Trinovate Synergy
description: Led planning and execution of a state-level technical fest, secured sponsorship and funding, coordinated teams, and hosted the flagship event.

title: Patent Filed – AI-Based Interview Evaluation System
description: Filed a patent for an AI-powered system that automates technical interviews, evaluates candidate responses, and generates structured assessment reports.

title: Research Paper Submitted – AI-Based Interview Evaluation System
description: Authored a research paper detailing system architecture, methodology, and experimental evaluation of an AI-driven interview and candidate assessment platform.
